stories.title: **Headline:** Oklahoma State Stuns No. 1 Oklahoma 6-4 — Ruby Meylan Delivers in Bedlam

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
No. 21 Oklahoma State 6, No. 1 Oklahoma 4. 🥎

Ruby Meylan: complete game, 133 pitches, 9 K.
OSU's first upset of a No. 1 team since the 2022 Big 12 Championship.

Bedlam delivered. #OKState #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Bedlam details: 🥎

Meylan: 133 pitches, CG, 9 K
OU's Dayton: 2-run double in 7th — too little
Tornado warning ended play after the 7th
Oklahoma falls to 40-5. Two losses in four days.

The No. 1 spot is suddenly up for grabs. #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Bedlam Fallout — OU's No. 1 Ranking in Jeopardy as Texas Tech Eyes the Top

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Before the Bedlam loss, OU was No. 1 in the NFCA poll by 2 POINTS.

Oklahoma: 747 pts. Texas Tech: 745 pts.

OU is now 40-5. Tech is 40-3.

Week 12 poll drops April 21. The top just reshuffled. #CollegeSoftball #NCAASoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Texas Tech is 40-3. NiJaree Canady is 17-2.
Zero losses since mid-March.

Oklahoma just lost Bedlam and fell to 40-5.

NFCA Week 12 poll drops April 21. The No. 1 ranking is Texas Tech's to lose. #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Kendall Wells at 31 HRs — 6 from Espinoza's All-Time Record, Next Stage Is Arkansas

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells needs 6 more home runs to break a record that has stood since 1995.

Lauren Espinoza hit 37 for Arizona. Wells is at 31. 🥎

Oklahoma hosts No. 6 Arkansas this weekend — three more games, three more chances.

The record chase continues. #Sooners #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** OU vs. Arkansas This Weekend — Bounce-Back Bid After Back-to-Back Losses

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Oklahoma (40-5) hosts No. 6 Arkansas this weekend.
April 17-19. Love's Field. ESPN2.

Two losses in four days. This is not a soft landing.

Arkansas won series over Miss. State and Florida in April.

OU needs this one. #Sooners #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Nebraska Heads to Minnesota — No. 6 Huskers Chase First Big Ten Title Since 2011

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
No. 6 Nebraska is at Minnesota this weekend. 🥎

33-6. 14-1 Big Ten. 8-game win streak.
The Huskers are chasing a Big Ten regular-season title.

Coach Rhonda Revelle's program is one of college softball's best stories in 2026. #Huskers #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Texas Tech Primed to Take No. 1 — Red Raiders Win While OU Stumbles

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Texas Tech was 2 points from No. 1 before Oklahoma lost Bedlam.

The Red Raiders are 40-3. NiJaree Canady is 17-2.

OU is now 40-5.

April 21 NFCA poll is going to be interesting. #CollegeSoftball #TexasTech

stories.title: **Headline:** FSU Senior Weekend — Seminoles Host UNC to Begin Post-Stanford Rebuild

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
FSU hosts North Carolina this weekend for Senior Weekend.

The Seminoles lost their 25-game win streak to Stanford last week.

Three games vs. UNC. Then Florida April 22.

FSU's national seed depends on these 10 days. #FSUSoftball #CollegeSoftball
